Zambia Comprehensive National Employer Database

Purpose: Directory of organizations across all 10 provinces and major districts of Zambia suitable for employment, industrial attachment, or Work-Integrated Learning (WIL). Each entry is tagged with the professions (drawn from a 9-cluster, ~150-role list) that can be hosted there.
Last updated: 2026-05-30.
Honesty rule: Where contact info could not be verified from an official source we wrote “Not publicly listed”. Google Maps links use the safe public Maps search URL (company name + town + Zambia).

Table of Contents

LUSAKA PROVINCE COPPERBELT PROVINCE CENTRAL PROVINCE SOUTHERN PROVINCE EASTERN PROVINCE NORTHERN PROVINCE MUCHINGA PROVINCE LUAPULA PROVINCE NORTH-WESTERN PROVINCE WESTERN PROVINCE

LUSAKA PROVINCE

LUSAKA (Capital City)

Sector: ENERGY & POWER UTILITIES

[1] ZESCO Limited (Head Office)

Address: Stand No. 6949, Great East Road, Lusaka

Phone: +260 211 361111 / +260 211 363636

Email: [email protected]

Website: https://www.zesco.co.zm

Google Maps: Open in Maps

Note: National vertically-integrated electricity utility — generation, transmission, distribution. Major employer of all engineering disciplines, trades, IT and business graduates.

Professions that can work here:

  • Engineering: Electrical Engineer, Civil Engineer, Mechanical Engineer, Telecommunications Engineer, Environmental Engineer, Renewable Energy Engineer, Electronics Engineer, Structural Engineer, Geomatics/GIS Specialist, Mechatronics Engineer
  • Health: Nurse, Clinical Officer, Environmental Health Officer
  • Science & IT: IT Specialist, Software Developer, Database Administrator, Network Engineer, Cybersecurity Analyst, Hydrologist, Statistician, Geologist, Metrologist
  • Business: Accountant, Auditor, HR Manager, Procurement Officer, Project Manager, Public Relations Officer, Supply Chain Specialist, Business Administrator, Logistics Manager, Marketing Specialist, Risk Manager, Financial Analyst, Economist
  • Education & Humanities: Records Manager, Librarian, Journalist, Social Worker
  • Legal: Lawyer/Advocate, Legal Advisor, Corporate Secretary
  • Trades: Power Electrical Technician, Electrician, Plumber, Welder, Automotive Mechanic, Refrigeration Technician, Heavy Equipment Operator, Metal Fabricator

Phone: +260 211 261647

Website: https://www.cec.com.zm

Google Maps: Open in Maps

Note: Bi-national authority of Zambia and Zimbabwe managing the Kariba Dam.
